'''mathaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyamivirus|nyamivirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyamivirus|nyamivirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mathaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || mæthæbæth || mæthæbæj || mæthæbæsh || mæthæbæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || mathathabath || mathathabaj || mathathabash || mathathaba
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || mathabath || mathabaj || mathabash || mathaba
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || mathafbafth || mathafbafj || mathafbafsh || mathafbaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || mathabatha || mathabaja || mathabasha || mathabaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || mathabath || mathabaj || mathabash || mathaba
|-
| [[Possessive]] || mathabathal || mathabajal || mathabashal || mathabakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || mathabaathatha || mathabaajaja || mathabaashasha || mathabaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || mathabathan || mathabajan || mathabashan || mathabakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || mathabathaoro || mathabajaoro || mathabashaoro || mathabakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
